claim_boundary: Tier 4.31b is local fixed-point reference/parity evidence only. A pass supports C/runtime implementation work for the named seven-EMA fading-memory temporal subset. It does not prove C implementation, SpiNNaker hardware transfer, speedup, multi-chip scaling, nonlinear recurrence, universal benchmark superiority, language, planning, AGI, or ASI.

classification.claim: local fixed-point seven-EMA temporal reference parity
nonclaims: not language, planning, AGI, or ASI
classification.recommendation: Proceed to native temporal source/runtime implementation and local C host tests; do not upload hardware until the source audit passes.

criteria.name: range refinement supported
criteria.rule: conservative saturates and selected does not

criteria.name: next step remains source/local before hardware
criteria.value: Tier 4.31c source/runtime implementation + local C host tests
